over: note:Each row selects the PT_TABLE column whose name matches the current row's transmitter ID (row_transmitter_id). Requires an unpivot/melt of neuract__PT_TABLE wide columns into long-form rows keyed by field_key, then joined to the device_mappings table on field_key.

note:No location column exists in the catalog. Requires a supplementary lookup table or additional column in neuract__device_mappings that maps field_key (e.g. PT_105) to a human-readable installation location (e.g. 'Raw Water Pump').
note:No alarm or event table present in the catalog. This scalar requires either an alarm-state table not yet ingested, or a real-time API/aggregate query external to the current catalog.
note:Runtime system value injected at report-generation time. Should be passed as a system parameter (e.g. params.gen_timestamp) rather than sourced from any catalog column.

note:Mapped tentatively to neuract__device_mappings.scale (TEXT, no sample). In industrial device-mapping schemas the scale field typically stores the engineering-units range (e.g. '0 - 5'). Verify sample data before confirming this mapping.
